ascension.title: Ascension Mode Level 17
ascension.description: Normal enemies have more challenging movesets and abilities.

ascension.title: Ascension Mode Level 18
ascension.description: Elites have more challenging movesets and abilities.

ascension.title: Ascension Mode Level 19
ascension.description: Bosses have more challenging movesets and abilities.

map_rooms.title: Unknown
map_rooms.description:
An unknown room.

You may encounter monsters, treasures, shops, or something entirely different.

map_rooms.title: Merchant
map_rooms.description:
The mysterious Merchant sells his wares in these rooms.

Spend your well earned Gold here!

map_rooms.title: Treasure
map_rooms.description: Relics and Gold can be found in these coveted rooms.

map_rooms.title: Rest
map_rooms.description: Stop by these rooms to Heal some HP or Upgrade a card.

map_rooms.title: Enemy
map_rooms.description: Hostile enemies reside in these rooms.

map_rooms.title: Elite
map_rooms.description:
Powerful foes are in these rooms.

Defeating them will reward you a Relic.

core_concepts.title: ethereal
core_concepts.description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, it is exhausted. Exhausted cards are removed from your deck until the end of combat.

core_concepts.title: retain
core_concepts.description: Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.

core_concepts.title: status
core_concepts.description: Status cards are removed at the end of combat.

core_concepts.title: curse
core_concepts.description: Curse cards are negative cards that stay in your deck.

core_concepts.title: Return
core_concepts.description: Cards are drawn from here at the start of each turn.

core_concepts.title: Discard Pile
core_concepts.description: Cards here are shuffled into your draw pile when it runs out of cards.

orbs.title: Dark
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by.
Evoke: Deal damage to the enemy with lowest HP.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, increase this Orb's damage by.
orbs.evoke: Deal damage to the enemy with lowest HP.

orbs.title: Frost
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, gain Block.
Evoke: Gain Block.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, gain Block.

orbs.title: Lightning
orbs.description:
Passive: At the end of turn, deal damage to a random enemy.
Evoke: Deal damage to a random enemy.
orbs.passive: At the end of turn, deal damage to a random enemy.
orbs.evoke: Deal damage to a random enemy.

orbs.title: Plasma
orbs.description:
Passive: At the start of turn, gain Energy.
Evoke: Gain Energy.
Plasma is unaffected by Focus.
orbs.passive: At the start of turn, gain Energy.
orbs.evoke:
Gain Energy.
Plasma is unaffected by Focus.

stances.title: Wrath
stances.description: Your Attacks deal double damage and you take double damage from attacks.

stances.title: Calm
stances.description: Upon exiting this Stance, gain Energy Energy.

stances.title: Divinity
stances.description: Upon entering this Stance, gain Energy Energy Energy. Attacks deal triple damage. Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.

keywords.description: Negates the next debuff.
Until next turn, prevents damage.
Burns are unplayable status cards that damage you.
Channeling an Orb puts it into your first empty slot. If you have no empty slots, your first Orb is automatically Evoked to make room.
Whenever you draw a card, randomize its cost.
Curse cards are negative cards that stay in your deck.
Orb: Increases damage every turn. When Evoked, deals damage to the enemy with the least HP.
Dazed are unplayable status cards.
Dexterity improves Block gained from cards.
If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, it is exhausted. Exhausted cards are removed from your deck until the end of combat.
Consume your rightmost Orb and use its Evoke effect.
Removed until end of combat.
Focus increases the effectiveness of Channeled Orbs.
While Frail, gain 25% less Block from cards.
Orb: Gains Block.
Start each combat with this card in your hand.
Reduce ALL damage taken and HP loss to 1.
Orb: Deals damage to random enemies.
This card has yet to be unlocked.
Lock-On targets receive 50% more damage from Orbs.
Opener cards may only be played as the first card each turn.
Orb: Gains Energy.
Poisoned creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, Poison is reduced by 1.
Retained cards are not discarded at the end of turn.
Shivs are 0 cost Attack cards which Exhaust.
Status cards are removed at the end of combat.
Strength adds additional damage to attacks.
Any card with the word "Strike" in its name.
When receiving Attack damage, deals damage back.
This card is NOT IMPLEMENTED. Someone should really fix that...
Transformed cards become a random card of any rarity.
This card has yet to be encountered.
Unplayable cards cannot be played from your hand.
Upgrading cards makes them more powerful. Cards can only be upgraded once.
Voids are unplayable status cards that consume energy when drawn.
Vulnerable creatures take 50% more damage from Attacks.
Weakened creatures deal 25% less damage with Attacks.
Wounds are unplayable status cards.
In this Stance, you deal and receive double attack damage.
Upon exiting this Stance, gain Energy Energy.
You can only have one stance at a time.
Look at the top X cards of your draw pile. You may discard any of them.
Upon entering this stance, gain Energy Energy Energy. Attacks deal triple damage. Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.
When you obtain 10 Mantra, enter Divinity.
Your next Attack deals additional damage.
Regen heals HP at the end of your turn. Each turn, Regen is reduced by 1.
Gain Strength at the end of your turn.
Triggers whenever this card kills a non-minion enemy.
